title: Senior Financial Analyst - CDSL - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - CDSL - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
We at CDSL are looking for an experienced Senior Financial Analyst based out of Allahabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About CDSL:
CDSL is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Income Tax

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CDSL!
